name: IPinfo API
desc: Identify geolocation details, ISP data, VPN presence, and connection networks for any IP address globally.

name: ZeroBounce API
desc: Verify email addresses in real-time to detect invalid domains, spam traps, catch-all targets, and decrease bounce metrics.

name: Hunter.io API
desc: Perform email verifications, find public corporate contact details, and check email deliverability options.

name: Mailgun API
desc: Robust cloud email API for developers. Send, receive, parse, and validate transactional email outputs.

name: Twilio SendGrid API
desc: Transactional and marketing email API designed for massive delivery, tracking statistics, and domain authentication.

name: Clerk API
desc: Integrate complete user authentication flow, session validation, active login blocks, and profile settings.

name: Kinde API
desc: Manage organizations, fetch login details, provision client accounts, and control API authorization credentials.

name: CoinGecko API
desc: Access live cryptocurrency valuations, market caps, token details, volumes, exchange directories, and historical charts.

name: CryptoCompare API
desc: Fetch blockchain prices, market updates, live coin conversions, news feeds, and historical cryptocurrency metrics.

name: Open Exchange Rates API
desc: Accurate real-time global currency exchange rates, conversion tools, historical values, and fiat indexes.

name: Fixer.io API
desc: A lightweight currency converter API supporting live updates for 170+ global fiat currencies.

name: CurrencyBeacon API
desc: Lightweight REST API delivering real-time currency conversions, historical fiat data, and currency codes.

name: Alpha Vantage API
desc: Real-time and historical financial indexes, stock market quotes, forex exchanges, and cryptocurrency valuation metrics.

name: IEX Cloud API
desc: Access curated financial data feeds, historical stock metrics, corporate actions, and options data.

name: Plaid API
desc: Securely connect web applications with user bank account details to verify balances, fetch balances, and initialize ACH transactions.

name: Stripe API
desc: Integrate subscription logic, capture card payments, handle payouts, and manage invoice details globally.

name: Lemon Squeezy API
desc: Manage SaaS subscriptions, create checkouts, fetch customer details, and track license keys.

name: Reddit API
desc: Interact with Reddit subreddits, fetch hot posts, query user metrics, and post content programmatically.

name: Unsplash API
desc: Access Unsplash's collection of over 3 million high-quality, royalty-free photography images.

name: Pexels API
desc: Search and download thousands of royalty-free images and stock videos programmatically.

name: Pixabay API
desc: Fetch high-resolution vector graphics, illustrations, photography, and audio clips programmatically.

name: GIPHY API
desc: Integrate GIPHY's library of animated GIFs, stickers, and emoticons into web layouts.

name: Genius API
desc: Search song lyrics, fetch artist biographies, and query music annotations catalog data.

name: TMDb API
desc: Comprehensive metadata library for movies, TV series, actors, ratings, and video trailers.

name: OpenWeatherMap API
desc: Live weather details, localized forecasts, historical weather reports, and satellite maps.

name: Weatherstack API
desc: Query global weather reports, current temperature indexes, and wind conditions using a simple REST format.

name: AccuWeather API
desc: Access AccuWeather's forecasting indexes, localized weather metrics, and storm warnings.

name: JSONPlaceholder API
desc: Fake online REST API for testing and prototyping client-side scripts with mock user, post, and comment data.

name: Dog API
desc: A public directory of dog breed images, lists, and sub-breeds for development and pet applications.

name: Cat Fact API
desc: Retrieve random fun facts about cats, cat breeds, and cat stats programmatically.

name: Advice Slip API
desc: Simple API that returns a random piece of advice or advice searches as JSON objects.

name: AnimeChan API
desc: Get random anime quotes, quotes by character names, or quotes by anime series.

name: NASA API
desc: Access NASA's open databases including Astronomy Picture of the Day, Mars Rover Photos, and Asteroid hazards.

name: OpenRouter API
desc: A unified interface for LLMs. Query dozens of top models including GPT-4, Claude 3, Llama 3, and Gemini via a single API key.
